title: Workflow repair starts with graph validity
canonical_summary: Repair should first check graph validity before changing model settings.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Start with graph validity and missing-node checks.

title: Missing class_type means missing node definition

title: Workflow fails with missing node/class_type
canonical_summary: Missing class_type indicates the current install does not know a node referenced by the workflow.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Identify missing nodepack or replace only with source-backed options.
exactness_guard: Do not make up replacement nodes.
notes: Seed card for v0.2.5; review before v0.3 promotion.

title: Workflow loads but links are broken

title: Workflow repair source priority

canonical_summary: Current object_info, installed node definitions, and the workflow JSON outrank screenshots or memory.

title: How to answer workflow repair questions
canonical_summary: Classify failure, name required evidence, and give the next safe diagnostic step.
source_priority_rule: Prefer canonical lane guidance and source-backed project files over memory or old notes.
answer_pattern: Use: classify failure -> inspect exact error -> source of truth -> narrow fix.
